Class Application

java.lang.Object
classes.Application
Direct Known Subclasses:
StudentVisa, TouristVisa, WorkVisa
public abstract class Application extends Object
Application class, abstract and father class to three other visa classes
Version:
1.0
Author:
Hassan Abdus Salam

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private Applicant
    applicant
    The applicant who owns this application, an instance of applicant class.
    private int
    applicationNO
    Application number
    final double
    OFFICE_FEE
    office processing fee charged for every application
    private Officer
    officer
    The officer assigned to this application
    private Status
    status
    Current Status of the application
    private LocalDate
    submissionDate
    Date the application got submitted

  • Constructor Details

    • Application

      public Application(int applicationNO, LocalDate submissionDate, Applicant applicant, Status status, Officer officer)
      Construct an application with parameters below:
      Parameters:
      applicationNO - the application number
      submissionDate - the date of submission
      applicant - the applicant who made this application
      status - the current status
      officer - the officer assigned

  • Method Details

    • calculateProcessingFee

      public abstract double calculateProcessingFee()
      Calculates and returns the total processing fee for this application. must be overridden by each visa subclass.
      Returns:
      the total processing fee
